title: Outlook Calendar - Reoccurring meetings glitch
excerpt: Hi all! I am struggling to find a solution to the outlook calendar integration for reoccurring meetings. It only links it to the meeting date that it was created for; not the meetings there after. I tried adding more col…

posts.author: Kerryn (Kerryn Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all! I am struggling to find a solution to the outlook calendar integration for reoccurring meetings. It only links it to the meeting date that it was created for; not the meetings there after. I tried adding more columns, but since the only options are start and end date; that doesn’t really jive.

Anyone had any success overcoming this?
